name: Cranberry Orange Crescents
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz) Pillsbury Crescent Dinner Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll the dough and separate it into 8 triangles.
2. Mix together the remaining ingredients: cranberries, cracker crumbs, orange peel, and sugar.
3. Spread the mixture evenly over each triangle of dough.
4. Roll up each triangle, place on a baking sheet, and bake according to package directions.
